name: FAST NUCES (National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences)
notes: Multiple campuses across Pakistan. Known for strong CS/SE programs.

name: National University of Sciences and Technology (NUST)
notes: SEECS and MCS schools offer CS/SE programs. Highly competitive entry.

name: COMSATS University Islamabad (CUI)
notes: Multiple campuses. CS department is one of the oldest and largest in Pakistan.

name: Lahore University of Management Sciences (LUMS)
notes: Offers BS Computer Science through SBASSE. Private university, higher fee.

name: Ghulam Ishaq Khan Institute of Engineering Sciences and Technology (GIKI)
notes: Located in Topi, Swabi. Highly ranked engineering institute.

name: Pakistan Institute of Engineering and Applied Sciences (PIEAS)
notes: Strong in engineering and sciences. Limited CS seats, highly competitive.

name: University of Engineering and Technology (UET) Lahore
notes: Public university, lower fee. Main and KSK campuses offer CS.

name: Information Technology University (ITU) Lahore
notes: Specialized IT university in Lahore. Offers BS Computer Science.

name: Air University
notes: Federally chartered public sector university. Multiple campuses.

name: Bahria University
notes: Federally chartered public sector university. Multiple campuses.
